excluded_source_classes.reason: Contains planning notes, historical draft claims or private fields; use only as source material for sanitized formal outputs.
Operational records for Aureon audit, not funder attachments.
Reusable correspondence drafts; not application attachments unless converted into signed support evidence or approved correspondence.
Use only in specific finance sections when the route requires it and the exact field is approved.

rules: Attach only allowlisted formal files unless a route-specific artifact is generated and scanned.
Do not attach Drive war-room, source-dump, internal ledger, raw finance, or outreach-draft files.
Portal text files can be copied into IFS fields only after route eligibility gates are satisfied.
This guard does not make any route submit-ready by itself.
